title: Flow If (Text)
description: A single-gate conditional filter for text chunks. Evaluates a user-supplied
Python expression against each incoming text; truthy lets the chunk through,
falsy drops it via preventDefault. The expression has access to the current
`text` payload, a per-chunk `state` store, and condition helpers exposed under
Evaluation errors are treated as False so malformed payloads never crash the pipeline.

fields.name: condition
fields.title: Expression
fields.description: Python expression. Must evaluate to a boolean. Bindings: text (payload), state, cond.*

fields.name: timeout_s
fields.title: Timeout (s)
fields.description: Max time for a single condition evaluation.
